name: Tyler W. Konney
biography: Tyler W. Konney is President of Taylor & Dodge, overseeing all operations and setting the strategy for the company. He is an expert in film finance and production, producing pictures such as May December and representing hundreds of titles as a sales agent both internationally and in the domestic market. Tyler is also a screenwriter with multiple features as a writer under his belt that were released by Sony Pictures. He graduated from Choate Rosemary Hall and the University of Southern California and is a proud member of the Trojan alumni network.
nationality: New York City, New York, USA
